title: MetaMask core headless Perps trading lifecycle
description: Proves the headless `core` adapter places and closes a REAL Perps order on HyperLiquid testnet through the full signing path: a default viem signer backs the perps controller's wallet adapter, the active HyperLiquid testnet provider is initialized, and a small BTC long is opened then closed. Leaves the account FLAT. No CDP, bridge, or UI.

status.intent: Resolve the core checkout and report headless compatibility mode

start_flat.intent: Converge BTC testnet baseline to flat (no positions, no orders) before the proof window

place_order.intent: Place a small BTC long market order via the headless controller (real signed order to HL testnet)

close_position.intent: Close the BTC position via the headless controller (real signed close to HL testnet)

assert_flat.intent: Assert the BTC position closed — account is flat

teardown_flat.intent: Restore BTC testnet baseline to flat after the proof (leave the shared account clean)
